arts.ttl: Why Aston Villa have edge over Liverpool in race for €50m transfer target
arts.sum: Aston Villa are hoping they have the edge over Liverpool in the battle for one of La Liga’s standout stars as the Villains look to continue their transfer business in January. The deal is being led by Villa director Monchi, who signed Bade during his time at Sevilla, and they hope that the Spaniards links to his former club can swing a deal in their favour, with Liverpool believed to be interested also.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah Saudi transfer pressure increases as Sheikh puts Liverpool star in Al-Hilal shirt
arts.sum: Liverpool fans have been sent into bedlam after an image of Mohamed Salah in an Al-Hilal shirt was shared putting further pressure on the Egyptian star

arts.ttl: ‘Five year deal agreed’: Fabrizio Romano shares huge evening transfer development directly impacting Liverpool
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Omar Marmoush is heading to Manchester City, with Liverpool missing out on the Eintracht Frankfurt attacker. The Egyptian has been in red-hot form for the German club this season. In 17 Bundesliga matches, he has scored 15 goals and provided nine assists. arts.ttl: Liverpool contract twist may trigger Saudi part-takeover as Mohamed Salah could take stake in club
Stephen Bunting names the Steven Gerrard rumour that left Liverpool diehard 'nervy' amid ex Rangers boss no show
arts.sum: The Bullet reached the Bahrain Darts Masters quarter-final after seeing off Nitin Kumar

arts.ttl: Spanish press know what they are doing with Trent Alexander-Arnold Real Madrid claims
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has long been linked with a move to Real Madrid, but are the Spanish press just trying to cook up a storm?

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk delivers firm response to Liverpool 'crisis' talk
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk laughs off suggestions of a crisis at Liverpool over recent poor results.

arts.ttl: Could Arsenal or Man United sign Brentford's Bryan Mbeumo before the January transfer window closes?
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank plays down suggestions that Bryan Mbeumo could leave the Bees before the January transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Frank convinced Brentford will keep Mbeumo
arts.sum: Thomas Frank does not believe Brentford will lose Bryan Mbeumo this month. Mbeumo’s superb performances for the Bees have inevitably led to speculation that he could attract big offers. Manchester United and Arsenal have recently been linked with him. arts.ttl: Michael Owen identifies 'brilliant' replacement for Mo Salah as Liverpool star's contract saga rumbles on
arts.sum: Michael Owen has identified who Liverpool should sign as Mo Salah's replacement should the Egypt star leave Anfield this summer. Salah is in the last six months of his contract.
